title: Tier Vocabulary Is Catalog Source Material

checks.description: tier vocabulary files parse through the canonical vocab schema and include catalog descriptions

enforcement.description: tier vocabulary files parse through the canonical vocab schema and include catalog descriptions

decision: PatternSpec, ArchetypeSpec, and ArchetypeInstance files are first-class vocab declarations. They must carry enough natural-language metadata to serve future wiki/catalog pages without re-describing the same contract somewhere else.
